Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> @Alex, can you move to released image here?

@Dan, @Herbert I need sdnc-web-image:2.0.3 released to complete this task.

Patch Set 4:

"Regarding released version": Today there is 2.0.2 (M4) release. But this version does not not contain important fixes. We need SDNC RC0 Version 2.0.3. This release is expected in next days.

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> "Regarding released version": Today there is 2.0.2 (M4) release. But this version does not not contain important fixes. We need SDNC RC0 Version 2.0.3. This release is expected in next days.

then let's wait for this release and we'll be able to merge the patch!
